{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Emissaries
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emissaries]] grow by ingesting pieces of the [[Phoenix]] that it sheds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Emissaries]] are those who borrow power from the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
